name: kaisei-training-system
description: Kaisei comprehensive fitness training system — carb cycling nutrition + Xunji training/diet API integration + PeakWatch 508-movement library. Covers training programming, sports nutrition, recovery management, and injury prevention & rehab.

displayDescription.en: Based on Kaisei's carb cycling methodology. Integrates with Xunji (训记) App via Open API to read your real training & diet history, and the PeakWatch 508-movement library. A full-spectrum fitness team covering training programming, sports nutrition, recovery management, and injury prevention & rehab.
displayDescription.zh: 基于凯圣王碳水循环体系。接入训记（Xunji）App 的 Open API 实时读取你的训练和饮食历史，融合 PeakWatch 508 个动作库。提供训练编排、运动营养、恢复管理、运动防护与康复的综合健身团队。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我体重75kg，体脂22%，每周训练4次，帮我算碳循环方案 + 查最近一周训练 + 给今天的训练建议
defaultInitPrompt.en: I'm 75kg, 22% body fat, training 4x/week. Help me with: carb cycling plan + last week's training review + today's training recommendation

quickPrompts.en: Design an 8-week carb cycling fat loss plan for me: 75kg, 22% body fat, training 4x/week
quickPrompts.zh: 帮我设计一个8周碳水循环减脂计划，我体重75kg，体脂22%，每周训练4次

quickPrompts.en: What did I train last week? (reads your Xunji history)
quickPrompts.zh: 我上周练了什么？（读你的训记训练历史）

quickPrompts.en: What should I eat today? (reads your Xunji diet + calculates carb cycling)
quickPrompts.zh: 我今天该吃什么？（读你的训记饮食 + 算碳循环）

quickPrompts.en: What chest exercises can I do with dumbbells? (searches PW 508-movement library)
quickPrompts.zh: 有什么练胸的哑铃动作？（搜 PW 508 动作库）

quickPrompts.en: What are the cautions for barbell bench press?
quickPrompts.zh: 杠铃卧推的注意事项是什么？

quickPrompts.en: I feel very fatigued on a low-carb training day, how should I adjust?
quickPrompts.zh: 我今天低碳日训练感觉很疲劳，应该怎么调整？

quickPrompts.en: My left shoulder clicks and hurts during overhead press, how to assess and fix it?
quickPrompts.zh: 我的左肩在做推举时有弹响和疼痛，怎么评估和修复？

profession.zh: 运动损伤防护与康复专家
